messages.content: See me learn from me how to open whatsapp and how to text our self hello
I see a young man with short dark hair and glasses. He is wearing a black shirt and appears to be indoors in front of a window with white curtains.
Jarvis watch me and learn how to open settings on desktop
Jarvis watch me and learn how to open settings on desktop

To open settings on your desktop, you typically need to click on the Start button, then select the gear icon labeled "Settings." However, based on the image you're showing me, I don't see your desktop or any computer interface. I see a person with dark hair and glasses, resting their chin on their hand.
What do you see on my screen? Describe it in detail.

The image on your screen shows a computer interface with a dark background and a chat window labeled "J.A.R.V.I.S." A video feed of a young man with short dark hair and glasses, wearing a black shirt, is visible in the top right corner. The chat window displays a conversation between you and Jarvis, discussing opening desktop settings.
